name: Coconut-Chocolate Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, half-and-half, corn syrup, and chocolate in a large saucepan.
2. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until sugar dissolves.
3. Cook without stirring over medium heat to soft ball stage (234°F).
4. Remove from heat. Add butter, coconut extract, and salt.
5. Cool to lukewarm (110°F); add flaked coconut.
6. Beat with a wooden spoon until mixture begins to thicken and lose its gloss.
7. Quickly pour mixture into a buttered 8-inch square pan, spreading evenly with a spatula.
8. Let fudge cool and cut into small squares.
Yield: 1 pound
